Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement By Sjk Development, Inc. And Sean J. Keighran
Off Calendar Nov-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS SJK DEVELOPMENT, INC. and SEAN J. KEIGHRAN'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT (WITH PLAINTIFF 370 7TH STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION).
APPEARANCES: Richard G. Arneal, Esq. of Van De Poel, Levy & Allen, LLP 925/948-0584 for defts/x-complainants & moving parties; Victoria L. Williams, Esq. of LaMore, Brazier, Riddle & Giampaoli 408/280-6800 x123 for deft & opposing party Media Lofts, LLC (appearing via CourtCall); Glenn Kelble, Esq. of Dale, Braden & Hinchcliffe 805/658-9393 for x-deft Giampolini & Co. (appearing via CourtCall); Richard D. Seely, Esq. of Law Offices of David L. Brault 949/458-3560 for x-deft Cell-Crete Corp. (appearing via CourtCall, late).
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE SETTLEMENT IS APPROVED. THE DECLARATIONS OF THE MOVING PARTIES PROVIDES AN OBJECTIVE BASIS FOR THE ALLOCATION. THE OPPOSING PARTIES HAVE NOT MADE A FACTUAL SHOWING THAT THE ALLOCATION IS IMPROPER OR COLLUSIVE. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098

Notice Of Motion And Motion Forj Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SJK DEVELOPMENT AND SEAN KEIGHRAN'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT (with plaintiff) is off calendar. Motion was untimely calendared per CCP 1005 and all parties have not waived that defect. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT NUEVA CASTILLA IRON WORKS, INC'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT (with plaintiff 370 7th Street HOA, and defendants/cross-complainants SJK Development, Inc. Sean J. Keighran and Media Lofts, LLC) is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
